Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 135 

RT_DEVMTL_REHAB_RSTRTV_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Respiratory, Development, Rehabilitate, or Restorative Services Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the respiratory, developmental, 
rehabilitative and restorative service provider category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME:
